pr-evidence/dedupe-strict-v1-release-hel.gpt55_review_summary: Beauvoir the 3rd reviewed the branch with GPT-5.5, found no issues, and approved. Focused reviewer checks passed: strict release help test plus CLI help test, and the public star-import surface test.
scope: release-bundle CLI refactor only; no release artifact validation behavior, parser flags, or output schemas changed.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; git diff --check; poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Centralized the strict V1 release-bundle CLI help text in document_kv_cache.release_bundle and reused it from the legacy restaurant_kv_serving release-bundle facade.
pr-evidence/dedupe-strict-v1-release-hel.why: Avoids drift between the public and legacy release-bundle CLIs as V1 strict release requirements evolve.
